tasks.title: Task별 .harness 맥락 디렉토리 도입
tasks.dod: .harness/tasks/<task-key>/ 구조와 루트 템플릿 역할이 문서·skeleton·최근 이관 예시로 정리됨
tasks.acceptance: test -d .harness/tasks/4.11-rescue-from-main && test -d .harness/tasks/readme-user-friendly && test -f .harness/tasks/readme-user-friendly/tasks.index.snapshot.json && test -f templates/skeleton/.harness/tasks/.gitkeep && grep -q '템플릿' .harness/STATE.md && grep -q '.harness/tasks' CLAUDE.md && grep -q '.harness/tasks' AGENTS.md && grep -q '.harness/tasks' .agents/skills/harness-work/SKILL.md && python3 scripts/validate_tasks.py && python3 scripts/sync_plans.py --check
